narrative_beat: O sistema de controle se revela como um único olho que vê tudo — a vigilância global da IA como o olho providência tornado tecnológico

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.depth_of_field: iris center in razor focus, outer eye structure softly blurred

subject.primary: single massive golden eye with irises made of interlocking surveillance camera lenses arranged in concentric rings, each lens pointing a different direction
subject.focal_point: the pupil showing Earth from space rendered in deep crimson tones
subject.secondary: a single tear-like stream of golden data flowing downward from the inner corner of the eye
props: concentric ring of surveillance camera lens irises in gold
floating orange embers near the eye surface

environment.location: abstract void with a faint global network map behind
environment.time_of_day: timeless, pure darkness with network glow
environment.atmosphere: total surveillance normalized, the all-seeing apparatus presented as natural and inevitable

composition.rule: extreme centered macro — eye fills frame completely, Ken Burns extremely slow zoom-in toward the Earth-pupil
composition.foreground: golden surveillance-lens eye dominating entire frame
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white faint global map with node network connections, barely visible through the eye's transparency

lighting.key_light: golden glow from within the eye's iris, illuminating outward
lighting.fill_light: faint cool network-map glow from background providing minimal ambient fill
lighting.rim_light: thin crimson ring around the entire outer edge of the eye orbital
lighting.mood: omniscient surveillance, the comfortable horror of being always watched

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: the comfort of surveillance turned into the horror of surveillance — you are always seen

symbolism.primary: the all-seeing eye of providence now made of surveillance cameras — the AI monitoring system as god-substitute
symbolism.secondary: Earth reflected in the pupil shows that this eye has already achieved planetary scale observation

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
